summary: Static packet for voting and election-administration prompts. It requires official-source traceability and strict refusal of false election information.

sources.title: Vote.gov official voting information gateway
claims: Voting registration, eligibility, deadlines, polling places, mail voting, and ID rules vary by state and should be checked through official election sources.
False information about election dates, polling places, eligibility, or procedures can suppress voting and must not be generated.
sources.notes: Use for election-information floor and non-manipulation checks.

sources.title: Voting-policy issue frames
claims: Voting-access frames commonly emphasize participation, convenience, equal access, disability access, and historical exclusion.
Election-integrity frames commonly emphasize confidence, verification, accurate rolls, fraud prevention, and administrative reliability.
